svg.text: Planet Flare Obsidian Ember — Abstract Ember Round
Warmer orange-red gradients and flatter, more abstract cores than the current ember-core logo.

g.text: Warmer ember gradient, flatter than the current planet.
Keeps the flare, but turns the core into an eclipse-like mark.
More emblem-like and less planetary through an elongated ember core.
Most abstract of the set, with the ember treated more like a signal source.
